solution: ```class Solution:
    def findNthDigit(self, n: int) -> int:
        length = 1
        count = 9
        start = 1
        
        while n > length * count:
            n -= length * count
            length += 1
            count *= 10
            start *= 10
        
        start += (n - 1) // length
        s = str(start)
        return int(s[(n - 1) % length])
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Identify the digit-length zone containing the nth digit, then compute the exact number and the specific digit within that number. Uses arithmetic to avoid string concatenation until the final digit extraction.
